rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE FRIDA KOPPL TRUST ONE DATED 8/5/11 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion To (1) Enforce Compliance With Deposition Subpoena For The Production Of Business Records, And (2) For Protective Order Re Medical Expert Depositions; And For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling by Judge Ross C. Moody. (1) Petitioner Rudolph Koppl's Motion to Enforce Compliance with Deposition Subpoena for the Production of Business Records, and for Protective Order Re Medical Expert Depositions; and for Monetary Sanction is HEARING REQUIRED. Parties to appear. (2) Respondents Monica and Alan Zimmerman's Motion for Protective Order Re Deposition of Designated Experts Nancy Hoffman and Jonathan Mueller is HEARING REQUIRED. Parties to appear. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
